title: AntiBlockRotation
description:
Makes your ores, bedrock into Deepslate, tuff.
And make your base untracable!
body:
## 🛡️ Anti Block **Rotation** 🪻

A smart **anti-tracing resource pack** that converts rotated or suspicious blocks like **ores and bedrock** into natural-looking blocks such as **deepslate** and **tuff**.

This prevents unusual block rotations and textures from standing out, keeping your builds clean, natural, and undetectable.

---

## 🌲 Why would you need this?

On servers like **DonutSMP** (and other SMPs), players often track bases.
